{{Quote|Intimidate your business rivals!|An ad|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsAd|url=meta/img/ads/468_7.gif|text=Sirromco}}</ref>}}
'''Sirromco''' was a corporation based on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that sold office furniture during the late years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Its taglines were ''Intimidate your business rivals!'' and ''Office furniture on a grand scale''. In its advertisement it shows the table used in [[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku's]] conference at [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], and later for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Death Star conference room/Legends|conference room]].

Towards the end of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Sirromco held a sale and were accepting all currencies for payment.
